#  Move Drawing Disciplines 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' on the projects' Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * When you move drawing disciplines in the Drawings tool, the new order will be displayed for all users who can access the Drawings tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to your project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click the **Configure Settings** ![Icons Settings Gear](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8d4e4403c0eed73423d93c414c08e3a6/35b17d2e5497c876221891c1d9e5a114/icons-settings-gear.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.
  3. Scroll to **Edit Drawing Disciplines**.
  4. Click and drag over the **reorder** ![Icon Reorder](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7134434bbf9d83bd88e5e5ddd142310c/8943eff1fce6b93b00f319a4712aafd4/icon-reorder.png?fm=webp&h=16) icon for a discipline to move it to a new position.
  5. Continue moving disciplines as necessary.
  6. Scroll up and click **Update**.


## See Also
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-drawings)
  * [Edit Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/edit-drawings)
  * [Reorder Drawings Within a Discipline](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/reorder-drawings-within-a-discipline)
title: Move Drawing Disciplines
description: How to move drawing disciplines in your project's Drawings log.
